title: selaginella hartwegiana var. leptoblepharis
intro: Selaginella hartwegiana var. leptoblepharis is a species of plant in the Selaginella genus, commonly known as a type of spikemoss. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Mexico and other parts of Latin America, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems, due to its high content of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used topically in the form of a poultice or ointment to leverage its medicinal benefits.
